areas.label: The Economy
areas.synthesis: A fourth straight month of annual growth, reversing the early-2026 scare — despite the new 1% U.S. remittance tax and tighter migration policy. Remittances are ~3.5% of GDP.

headlines.title: April economic activity (IGAE) rebounds +2.3% — strongest in ~5 years
Rentas en la CDMX: aumentan más de 50% y complican el acceso a la vivienda

areas.label: Money & fintech
areas.synthesis: Chiefly the cost of propping up Pemex plus structural deficits — the credit story of the moment. Standing ratings: Moody's Baa3 stable, S&P BBB negative, Fitch BBB- stable.
